zh.lifeSummary: 當Rosina Gaertner於1626年8月22日出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，她的父親Christoph Gaertner37歲，母親Anna Feig35歲。她和Johann Christoph Beyer至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Gaertner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Helmut, Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Irmgard, Karl Heinz, Ulrich.

variants.name: Gartner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

nameMeanings.name: Rosina
meanings: A diminutive of the name Rose, or of the Italian form Rosa

en.lifeSummary: When Rosina Gaertner was born on 22 August 1626, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Christoph Gaertner, was 37 and her mother, Anna Feig, was 35. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Johann Christoph Beyer.

ko.lifeSummary: Rosina Gaertner(이)가 1626년 8월 22일 독일 프레이스타앳 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christoph Gaertner(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Feig(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Johann Christoph Beyer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rosina Gaertner nasceu em 22 de agosto de 1626, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Christoph Gaertner, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anna Feig, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Johann Christoph Beyer.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rosina Gaertner родилась 22 августа 1626 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, фристаат сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Christoph Gaertner было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Feig, 35. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Johann Christoph Beyer.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rosina Gaertner nació el 22 de agosto de 1626, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Freistaat Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Christoph Gaertner, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anna Feig, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Johann Christoph Beyer.
